key_themes: AI泡沫与投资回报不及预期
川普交易与时机的道德争议

unusual_whales.recent_shift: 近期推文更加强调川普内幕交易嫌疑，经济数据恶化以及AI投资未见预期回报，表明看空情绪上升。
representative_quotes: Trump purchased up to $530,000 of Micron Technology, $MU, stock in March 2026. He has since called $MU a 'great company' after the chipmaker pledged $250 million to the president's Trump Accounts. Unusual.

On July 23, 2025, Trump purchased up to $5 million of Broadcom, $AVGO, Meta, $META, Amazon, $AMZN, Apple, $AAPL, Microsoft, $MSFT, & Nvidia, $NVDA. Later that day, the Trump admin unveiled its AI Action Plan, a policy that benefited those companies.

key_themes: 存储芯片是AI革命的核心，海力士是最佳标的

xiaomustock.recent_shift: 近期从重仓存储芯片（海力士）转向部分配置康宁GLW和日月光ASX，认为康宁等新领域有更大爆发潜力。

康宁GLW 简直是下一代AI算力的底座，中了狗屎运。
